title: The Burning Soil
writer: Willy Haas, Arthur Rosen, Thea von Harbou
actors: Werner Krauss, Eugen Klöpfer, Vladimir Gajdarov
plot: When farmer Rog dies, his son Peter stays, but Johannes can not be satisfied with such a condition (and servant Maria's love) and finds a job as old Count Rudenberg's secretary. His ambition leads him to charm Gerda, the Count's u...
